definition: Existence or becoming within the sensual domain.
notes: The repository keeps sensual existence as the default because it reads clearly as one of the three modes of bhava while still allowing becoming-language when process is more important than domain. The term should be handled functionally, not as speculative cosmology alone. In many contexts it names the sensual sphere to which attachment and rebirth are tied.

context_rules.context: In the three modes of existence framework
In explanatory prose emphasizing process rather than domain
context_rules.notes: Allowed alternate when continuity with bhava-language is important.

context_rules.context: When the passage is clearly classifying a domain or realm of rebirth
context_rules.notes: Use when a slightly fuller phrase helps modern readers.

example_phrases.notes: One member of the threefold bhava framework.
